mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_emergency_plan t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_plan WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_emergency_plan t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_emergency_plan t WHERE t.plan_type = #{planType} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_plan WHERE plan_type = #{planType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_plan WHERE plan_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emergency_plan ( plan_id, plan_type, plan_name, description, response_steps, responsible_dept, responsible_name, training_start_date, training_end_date, resource_ids, checklist_template_id, notes, status, created_by, modified_by, plan_approver, completion_approver, approved, reject_reason, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{planType}, #{planName}, #{description}, #{responseSteps}, #{responsibleDept}, #{responsibleName}, #{trainingStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{trainingEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{resourceIds}, #{checklistTemplateId}, #{notes}, #{status}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, 0, NULL, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emergency_plan SET plan_type = #{planType}, plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, response_steps = #{responseSteps}, responsible_dept = #{responsibleDept}, responsible_name = #{responsibleName}, training_start_date = #{trainingStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, training_end_date = #{trainingEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, resource_ids = #{resourceIds}, checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId}, notes = #{notes}, plan_approver = #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, completion_approver = #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_emergency_plan SET status = #{status}, approved = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END,
reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_emergency_plan t WHERE t.checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId} AND t.deleted = 0
